The '''''Agonizer''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] and the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Teren Rogriss]]'s Anti-Zsinj Task Force. It housed the [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Group]] and was sent to [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]] to open negotiations with the Adumari.

After Adumar decided to join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the ''Agonizer'' was ordered to subjugate the planet. The New Republic sent a defensive fleet to drive the Imperials off, and the ''Agonizer'' took heavy damage during the [[Battle of Adumar|battle]], but managed to escape.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
